headline: NextEra Energy Expands Gas And Nuclear Options After Earnings Beat
summary: NextEra Energy (NYSE:NEE) has entered a new partnership with the U.S. Department of Commerce tied to a U.S. Japan trade deal. The agreement covers 9.5 GW of new gas fired generation capacity in Texas and Pennsylvania. The company is also advancing work on small modular reactor technology as part of its longer term power strategy. For investors watching NYSE:NEE, this development adds a large conventional power component alongside the company’s existing focus on renewables. Gas fired...
